prompt: Replace the callback-based event emitter with async/await. The EventEmitter class uses callbacks for all listener notifications but we need to support async listeners.

turns.content:
<task>
Replace the callback-based event emitter with async/await. The EventEmitter class uses callbacks for all listener notifications but we need to support async listeners.
</task>

arguments.summary: Read src/eventEmitter.ts (31 lines). Listener type is sync `(...args) => void`. emit() calls listeners synchronously. Need to: change Listener type to allow async functions, make emit() async and use Promise.allSettled, keep on/off/listenerCount unchanged.

turns.content:
FAIL  tests/eventEmitter.test.ts
  EventEmitter
    ✓ registers and emits events (3 ms)
    ✓ removes listeners (1 ms)
    ✗ handles listener errors gracefully (5 ms)
    ✓ counts listeners (1 ms)

  ● EventEmitter › handles listener errors gracefully

    expect(received).toBe(expected)
    Expected: 1
    Received: 0

      23 |     emitter.on('test', () => { throw new Error('boom'); });
      24 |     emitter.on('test', () => { calls++; });
      25 |     emitter.emit('test');
      26 |     expect(calls).toBe(1);

Test Suites: 1 failed, 1 total
Tests:       3 passed, 1 failed, 1 total

arguments.reasoning: The test at line 25 calls `emitter.emit('test')` but doesn't await it. Since emit is now async, the second listener hasn't been called yet when the assertion runs on line 26. The test needs to await the emit call.

arguments.summary: 3/4 tests pass. test 'handles listener errors gracefully' fails because emit() is now async but the test doesn't await it. The sync listeners run inside Promise.allSettled which defers execution. Need to add await to all emit() calls in tests.

turns.content: Added content after line 37 in tests/eventEmitter.test.ts

PASS  tests/eventEmitter.test.ts
  EventEmitter
    ✓ registers and emits events (1 ms)
    ✓ removes listeners (1 ms)
    ✓ handles listener errors gracefully (1 ms)
    ✓ counts listeners (1 ms)
    ✓ supports async listeners (12 ms)

Test Suites: 1 passed, 1 total
Tests:       5 passed, 5 total

arguments.summary: All 5 tests pass including new 'supports async listeners' test. emit() now returns Promise<void>, all test emit calls are awaited, async listener with setTimeout completes before assertion.
arguments.final_answer:
Refactored EventEmitter to support async:
1. src/eventEmitter.ts — Changed Listener type to allow Promise<void> return. emit() is now async, uses Promise.allSettled to run all listeners (sync and async) concurrently. Errors are caught and logged without stopping other listeners.
2. tests/eventEmitter.test.ts — Updated all 4 tests to use async/await on emit(). Added new test verifying async listener (with setTimeout) completes before assertion.
All 5 tests pass.
